enabledDescription: Display exact full-document heading numbers beside headings.
placementDescription: Choose where heading numbers are displayed.
prefixDescription: Text displayed immediately before each heading number. Spaces are preserved.
suffixDescription: Text displayed immediately after each heading number. Spaces are preserved.
minimumGutterWidthDescription: Hide outside placements when the corresponding gutter is narrower than this value in pixels.
loadError: Unable to calculate floating heading numbers
